topic: There is a contact in my phone I did not add and the profile photo is the outside of my own front door
title: There Is a Contact in My Phone I Did Not Add. The Photo Is My Front Door. | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: There is a contact in my phone I did not add. The profile photo is the outside of my own front door.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smartphone contacts screen showing one nameless contact entry with a small square photo of a residential front door from outside, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Iphone. Four years old. No shared accounts.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smartphone resting screen up on a wooden nightstand, the contacts app icon visible on the home screen, dim bedroom light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Scroll contacts every morning for work.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a hand scrolling through a contacts list on a smartphone, only the thumb and screen visible, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Saw the entry last fall. No name. Photo set.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a smartphone contacts entry with a blank name field and a small square photo of a residential front door at night, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Zoomed in. The doormat in the photo was my doormat.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smartphone screen displaying a zoomed in photo of a residential porch with a specific patterned doormat visible at night, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Taken from porch level. At night. From outside my locked door.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a smartphone showing a low angle photograph of a residential porch and front door taken at night from a height of about three feet, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of a thumb pressing the delete contact button on a smartphone screen, only the thumb and screen visible, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Came back overnight. Same photo. Same blank name.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smartphone screen the next morning showing the same nameless contact restored at the top of the list, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last week the contact started calling. My own number shows on the screen.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a smartphone screen during an incoming call showing the caller ID as the user's own phone number, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Answered Tuesday. Heard my own breathing on the other end. Then a doorknob turning.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smartphone held to an ear in a dark hallway, only the hand and phone visible, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I do not answer it anymore.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a smartphone screen showing a missed call notification labeled unknown caller, dim bedside lamp light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The contact photo updates weekly. Each angle is closer to the doormat.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smartphone screen displaying a contact profile photo of a porch doormat seen from a closer angle than the previous frame, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing
